title: hirtella thouarsiana subsp. thouarsiana
intro: Hirtella thouarsiana subsp. thouarsiana, also known as the Thouars' hirtella, is a species of flowering plant in the family Chrysobalanaceae, native to Madagascar. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hirtella thouarsiana subsp. thouarsiana include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. Hirtella thouarsiana subsp. thouarsiana is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in the production of herbal teas and tinctures.
